breakdown.next_tier_hint: Complete the remaining signals to reach the next tier.

cover.subtitle: Arrange temporary substitute support for someone you care for when you need respite, travel cover, or backup.

errors.load: Cover requests could not be loaded

providers.title: Care Provider Directory
providers.subtitle: Find care services, day centres, associations, and volunteers in your region
providers.no_providers_hint: Try adjusting your filters or search
providers.unavailable: The care provider directory is not available for this community.
providers.error_title: Care providers could not be loaded
providers.error_body: Please try again. If this keeps happening, contact your community coordinator.

federation_picker.title: Browse federated communities
federation_picker.search_placeholder: Search by community name or region
federation_picker.empty: No federated communities are currently discoverable. You can still enter a community slug manually.
federation_picker.fallback_label: Or enter a community slug manually

onboarding.title: Welcome to your Caring Community
onboarding.intro: We'll show you the most useful actions based on what you need.
onboarding.choice_recipient_desc: Find support, manage care, get help with daily tasks
onboarding.choice_helper_desc: Offer your time, support neighbours, log care hours
onboarding.choice_browse_desc: Explore the full hub of caring community features

pause_modal.title: Pause this support relationship
pause_modal.description: You can resume later. Would you like to add a reason or set a resume date?

end_modal.title: End this support relationship
end_modal.description: This action is permanent. The relationship will be marked ended and remain in your history.

data_export.title: My data export
data_export.intro: Download a complete copy of your personal data held by this caring community, in compliance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP) and GDPR. The export includes your profile, hours logged, support relationships, hour gifts and transfers, loyalty redemptions, regional points, safeguarding reports you've filed, and your civic digest preferences.
data_export.format_note: Your export will be a JSON file. Contact your community coordinator if you'd prefer another format.
data_export.privacy_note: Your export contains only data you've submitted or actions you've taken. It does not include other members' personal information.
data_export.error_toast: We couldn't generate your export. Please try again or contact support.

warmth_pass.title: My Warmth Pass
warmth_pass.not_eligible_hint: Reach Trusted tier to unlock your Warmth Pass
warmth_pass.what_is_this_body: Your Warmth Pass shows that you're a verified, trusted community helper. You can show it to care recipients, coordinators, and organisations as proof of your standing in the caring community.
warmth_pass.error: Could not load your Warmth Pass

providers.title: Care Provider Directory
providers.subtitle: Manage home care services, day centres, associations, and volunteer groups
providers.empty: No care providers yet - add one to get started.
providers.confirm_delete: Delete "{{name}}"? This will hide it from the directory.
providers.confirm_deactivate: Mark "{{name}}" as inactive? You can reactivate it later.

about.title: About this page
about.body: Care providers are external organisations that participate in the community care network alongside individual volunteers. They can be assigned help requests, receive time credit payments, and appear in the member directory.
about.verification_body: Verified providers display a badge in the directory. Check registration, insurance, and safeguarding policies before marking a provider as verified.
about.types_body: Use the type and description fields to show the care offered so members and coordinators can find the right provider for each request.

duplicates.title: Potential Duplicates
duplicates.summary: Scanned {{scanned}} active providers - {{total}} pairs above 65% similarity
duplicates.empty: No likely duplicates found. The directory looks clean.

loyalty.title: Loyalty Programme
loyalty.description: Time-credit to marketplace bridge. Members earn hours, merchants opt in to accept them as a CHF discount on their listings.

about.title: About this page
about.body: The Loyalty programme rewards members for sustained participation beyond direct care exchanges, including events, training, surveys, and milestones. Rewards are funded by time credits redeemed at participating marketplace sellers. Configure per-seller settings and review redemption history here. The programme is optional and can be disabled without affecting core timebank functionality.
about.rate_body: How many CHF a member saves for each hour they apply.
about.discount_body: Cap on how much of the order total can be paid in time credits.

settings.title: Per-Seller Loyalty Settings
settings.description: Pick a seller to configure whether they accept time credits as a discount on their listings, the exchange rate, and the max discount per order.
settings.accept_time_credits_hint: When enabled, this seller's listings show a time-credit option to members at checkout.
settings.exchange_rate_description: How many CHF a member saves for each hour they apply.
settings.maximum_discount_description: Cap on how much of the order total can be paid in time credits.
settings.view_only: View-only users cannot change loyalty settings.

ledger.title: Recent Redemptions
ledger.empty: No redemptions yet. Once a merchant opts in and a member redeems credits, the ledger will appear here.

reverse_modal.title: Reverse redemption
reverse_modal.body: This will restore {{hours}} hours to {{member}}'s wallet and mark the redemption as reversed. This cannot be undone.
reverse_modal.discount: Discount: CHF {{discount}} on order of CHF {{total}}
reverse_modal.reason_placeholder: e.g. Refunded order, member request, error correction

errors.rate_positive: CHF per hour must be greater than 0
errors.discount_range: Max discount percent must be between 0 and 100

hour_transfers.title: Cooperative Hour Transfers
hour_transfers.subtitle: When a member moves to another cooperative running NEXUS, they can transfer banked hours with them. Review outbound requests and approve only after confirming the member has registered at the destination cooperative.

pending.title: Awaiting your approval
pending.description: Each transfer must be manually approved by an admin. Check that the destination member email matches the member's new account before approving.

inbound.title: Received from other cooperatives (last 90 days)
inbound.description: This is an audit log only - inbound transfers are processed automatically when the source cooperative approves them. No action is required here.
inbound.empty: No transfers received in the last 90 days.

reject_modal.title: Reject transfer
reject_modal.reason_placeholder: Add context for the audit log

surveys.title: Municipality Surveys
surveys.subtitle: Collect structured feedback from residents, municipal partners, and programme teams.

about.title: About this page
about.body: Municipal surveys collect structured feedback from residents, municipal contacts, and partners about the community care programme. Use surveys to measure resident satisfaction, coordinator workload, and municipal partner sentiment. Survey responses feed directly into the pilot scoreboard and KPI metrics. Results are anonymous unless the respondent opts to be identified.
about.draft: Not yet sent; you can still edit questions.
about.closed: No longer accepting responses; results are finalised.
about.export_note: Response data can be exported as CSV for analysis in Excel or statistical tools. The platform calculates average scores and sentiment breakdowns automatically.

list.title: Municipality surveys
list.subtitle: Manage survey launches, response counts, analytics, and exports.

fields.title: Survey title
fields.title_placeholder: e.g. Satisfaction with local cycling lanes
fields.description_placeholder: Briefly explain what this survey is about and why it matters.
fields.anonymous_help: When enabled, respondent identities are not stored.
fields.options_placeholder:
Option A
Option B
Option C
fields.options_help: Each line becomes one selectable option.
fields.likert_help: Likert scale uses the standard 5-point scale from very dissatisfied to very satisfied.

create_modal.title: Create survey - step {{step}} of 2
create_modal.questions_intro: Add the questions respondents will see. At least one question is required to publish.

feedback.title: Municipality Feedback Inbox
feedback.subtitle: Receive, triage, and resolve resident feedback: questions, ideas, issues, and complaints routed to the municipality or community team.

about.title: About this page
about.body: This inbox collects feedback submitted by residents through the platform. Each item is categorised as a question, idea, issue report, or sentiment note and assigned a sentiment score. Use the triage controls to assign ownership, add internal notes, and track resolution. Items visible to all residents are marked as public; replies may be seen by the submitter and other members.
about.workflow: Status workflow: new means received and not yet reviewed; triaging means reviewed and assigned to an owner; in progress means actively being worked on; resolved means closed with a documented resolution; closed means closed without resolution.

empty.title: No feedback submissions match these filters.
empty.description: Try widening the filters or refreshing the inbox.

fields.triage_notes_placeholder: Internal notes for the triage team
fields.triage_notes_description: Internal only; not visible to the submitter. Use for team coordination, links to related issues, or escalation context.
fields.resolution_notes_placeholder: What was done to address this?
fields.resolution_notes_description: Required when resolving. Summarise what action was taken. May be shown to the submitter depending on the item's public visibility setting.

civic_digest.title: Civic Digest Cadence
civic_digest.subtitle: Configure the default delivery cadence for the personalised civic digest that members receive. The digest aggregates relevant community content - safety alerts, project updates, event notices, and announcements - into a single summary.
civic_digest.member_override: Members can override cadence and opt out of individual sources from their own digest preferences page.

about.title: About this page
about.body: The Civic Digest replaces the need for members to check multiple pages by delivering a personalised summary of what's relevant to them. You set the tenant default here. Members can override the cadence, or opt out entirely, from their own settings. Changing the tenant default only affects members who have never customised their preference.

cadence.title: Tenant default cadence
cadence.description: Controls the default delivery cadence for new members. Existing members keep whatever they have already chosen.

off.label: Off
off.description: No digest is sent. Members see updates only when they visit the platform.

daily.label: Daily
daily.description: A digest is sent each morning with the previous day's activity.

monthly.label: Monthly
monthly.description: A digest is sent on the first day of each month covering recent activity.

includes.title: What the digest includes
includes.description: Items are ranked per member by sub-region match, interest match, freshness, and source weight. Source mix:

recipient_circle.title: Care Recipient Circle
recipient_circle.subtitle: View the full support network around any member

about.title: About this page
about.body: A Care Recipient Circle is a private support group around an individual who receives care. This view shows their full support network: all helpers, total hours received, open help requests, and any safeguarding flags. Enter the member's user ID to look up their circle.
about.trust_tiers_body: Newcomer, Member, Trusted, Verified, Coordinator - shown for the recipient and each supporter.
about.safeguarding_body: A non-zero flag count indicates active safeguarding concerns recorded against this member. Review them in the Safeguarding section.
about.privacy_body: Circle data is visible only to circle members and tenant administrators. It is not included in community-wide reports or the member directory.

errors.load: Failed to load recipient circle. Check the member ID and try again.

safeguarding_reports.title: Safeguarding Reports
safeguarding_reports.subtitle: Review, assign, and resolve safeguarding concerns raised by members.
safeguarding_reports.empty: No safeguarding reports match these filters.

about.title: About this page
about.body: This page manages formal safeguarding incidents: situations where a member's welfare, safety, or dignity may be at risk. Reports are submitted by members, coordinators, or administrators. All reports must be triaged within the SLA configured in Operating Policy. Critical and high severity reports require immediate attention. Reports are tenant-scoped and cannot be seen by other communities.

severity_legend.title: Severity levels
severity_legend.critical: Immediate physical risk: escalate within 1 hour.
severity_legend.medium: Significant but non-urgent: triage within 72 hours.
severity_legend.low: Minor concern: review at the next coordinator meeting.

workflow.title: Status workflow
workflow.submitted: Report received, not yet reviewed by a coordinator.
workflow.triaged: Coordinator has assessed severity and assigned ownership.
workflow.investigating: Active investigation or support intervention underway.
workflow.resolved: Closed with documented resolution notes after action was taken.
workflow.dismissed: Closed with no further action. A reason must be recorded.

actions.title: Actions
actions.resolved_hint: "Resolved" closes this report with documented resolution notes. Use when action has been taken.
actions.dismissed_hint: "Dismissed" closes this report with no further action. A reason must be recorded in the notes above.

warmth_pass.title: Warmth Pass Lookup
warmth_pass.subtitle: View any member's community trust credential

about.title: About this page
about.body: A Warmth Pass is a portable trust credential showing that a member has reached Trusted tier, has received peer reviews, and is eligible to provide informal neighbourhood care. Recipients can request to see a helper's Warmth Pass before accepting assistance. Use this lookup to verify a member's credential on request, or to assist a member who is unsure of their eligibility.

errors.no_data: No data returned for this member ID.
errors.lookup_failed: Member not found or an error occurred.

not_eligible_notice.title: Member is not yet at Trusted tier and does not hold a Warmth Pass.
not_eligible_notice.body: To become eligible, they need to log more care hours and receive at least one peer review. They can check their own progress on the Trust profile page.

trust_tier.recompute_confirm: Recompute trust tiers for all active members? This may take a moment.

messages.saved: Trust tier configuration saved. Changes apply on the next recompute run.

regional_points.title: Regional Points
regional_points.description: Third-currency programme - runs alongside time credits and the marketplace currency. Disabled by default.

about.title: About this page
about.body: Regional Points are supplementary credits used to recognise contributions that don't fit the standard hour exchange model - for example, attending community events, participating in surveys, or completing training. They are distinct from time credits (care hours) and cannot be converted to them. Use them to encourage broader community participation beyond direct care.
about.secondary: Allocate points manually to individual members using the issue or adjust tools below. Points appear in the member's wallet alongside their time credit balance. Members can redeem Regional Points for local rewards defined in the Loyalty programme. Points expire after 12 months unless the expiry setting is set to 0 (never expire).

config.title: Programme configuration
config.enabled_hint: When off, the third currency is hidden from members and admin endpoints return 403.
config.symbol_description: Short suffix shown next to amounts (e.g. 'pts', 'SM')
config.auto_issue_hint: When a verified hour is logged, automatically award this many regional points.
config.member_transfers_hint: Allow members to send points to each other.
config.marketplace_redemption_hint: Allow members to redeem points as a CHF discount on participating sellers.

errors.non_zero_delta: Enter a non-zero delta (positive or negative)
